navigation_items.expected_usage: Global navigation menu across all pages
navigation_items.impact: Navigation cannot be managed via CMS

fibers.status: CONFIGURED but not displayed on any frontend page
fibers.note: Single fiber record exists but no page references it

size_charts.expected_usage: Product pages should display sizing information
size_charts.impact: No sizing guidance for B2B customers

media_assets.critical_issue: 96.7% of media files unused despite being uploaded

sustainability_page.filtering: Shows selected fabrics from portfolio settings (or first 6 if no selection)
sustainability_page.display_format: Grid cards with image, name, description, fabric type, composition
sustainability_page.data_transformation: Maps visualSwatchId to media assets for images

fabrics.consistency_status: N/A - Only used on one page
fabrics.potential_issue: Fabrics should also appear on Manufacturing page to showcase materials

fibers.critical_finding: Orphaned feature - admin can configure but frontend never displays
fibers.recommendation: Either remove fiber functionality or add to Sustainability/Manufacturing pages

homepage.formatting: Product cards with name, description, image (if available)

product_page.impact: Products shown on homepage only, no detailed view

products.consistency_status: SINGLE PAGE ONLY - no consistency issues but limited usage

categories.schema_issue: Categories use image_url (varchar) instead of media_id (integer FK)
categories.orphaned_media: 5 category SVG icons (IDs 166-170) uploaded but not linked

all_pages.cannot_be_managed: Navigation items table is empty, not used by frontend
all_pages.admin_panel: Exists at /admin/navigation but disconnected from frontend
all_pages.critical_finding: Navigation CMS is non-functional - frontend ignores database

navigation.consistency_status: CONSISTENT (hardcoded same everywhere) but not CMS-driven
navigation.recommendation: Either remove navigation admin panel or connect frontend to database

content_version_conflicts.reason: Most shared content used on single page only, no version conflicts possible

fabrics.future_risk: If added to Manufacturing page with different filtering/formatting

products.future_risk: If product detail pages added with different data structure

sustainability_page.layout: Grid (1 col mobile, 2 cols md, 3 cols lg)
sustainability_page.fallback: No image shown if visualSwatchId is null

homepage.issue: Should use media_id FK instead of string URL

completely_missing_features.user_story: Admin wants to add/remove/reorder nav items but changes have no effect

completely_missing_features.impact: MEDIUM - No sizing guidance for B2B customers
LOW - Admin configured 1 fiber but it's never displayed

partial_implementations.recommendation: Add fabric showcase to Manufacturing page to highlight materials
Create product detail pages for comprehensive B2B catalog

partial_implementations.schema_issue: Uses image_url string instead of media_id FK

orphaned_admin_features.issue: Admin panel exists but frontend doesn't use database
orphaned_admin_features.admin_changes: Have no effect on frontend navigation
orphaned_admin_features.root_cause: Frontend uses hardcoded nav instead of querying navigation_items table
orphaned_admin_features.fix_required: Connect frontend to navigation_items table or remove admin panel

orphaned_admin_features.issue: contact_page_configurations table has data but frontend is hardcoded
orphaned_admin_features.admin_changes: Database has address/phone/email but frontend uses different values
orphaned_admin_features.fix_required: Connect frontend to database or delete deprecated table

orphaned_admin_features.issue: Admin can create fibers but no frontend component displays them
orphaned_admin_features.admin_confusion: Admin adds fiber data, sees it in admin panel, but never appears on site
orphaned_admin_features.fix_required: Add fiber display component or remove fiber admin panel

schema_inconsistencies.issue: Uses image_url (varchar) instead of media_id (integer FK)
schema_inconsistencies.impact: Cannot leverage Object Storage for category images
schema_inconsistencies.orphaned_files: 5 category SVG icons (166-170) uploaded but unusable
schema_inconsistencies.fix_required: Migrate to media_id FK, link existing uploaded icons

schema_inconsistencies.issue: No FK constraints on referencing tables
schema_inconsistencies.impact: Allows orphaned files, broken references, no cascade delete
schema_inconsistencies.fix_required: Add explicit FK constraints with onDelete: 'SET NULL'

non_functional_cms_features: Navigation management (admin panel exists but frontend ignores it)
Contact page configuration (database has data but frontend uses hardcoded values)
Fibers (admin can configure but frontend never displays)
Certificates (admin panel exists but no frontend display)
Size Charts (admin panel exists but no frontend display)
Accessories (admin panel exists but no frontend display)
limited_shared_content_usage: Fabrics only on Sustainability (should be on Manufacturing too)
Products only on Homepage (need detail pages)
Categories only on Homepage (need browse pages)
Media barely used (2 of 61 files, 96.7% orphan rate)

consistency_status.good: No version conflicts identified (shared content used on single page only)
consistency_status.bad: Multiple admin features completely disconnected from frontend
consistency_status.ugly: Admin can manage content that never appears anywhere on site

immediate_fixes.action: Audit and disable non-functional admin panels
options: Option A: Connect frontend to these admin panels (implement display components)
Option B: Remove/hide admin panels that aren't connected to frontend
immediate_fixes.benefit: Prevent admin confusion, clarify what is/isn't CMS-driven

immediate_fixes.action: Fix Contact page - connect to database or remove config table
immediate_fixes.implementation: Either query contact_page_configurations or delete table and keep hardcoded
immediate_fixes.benefit: Admin changes to contact info actually work

steps: Update frontend to use media_id instead of image_url
immediate_fixes.benefit: Categories leverage Object Storage, consistent media management

content_expansion.action: Add fabric display to Manufacturing page
content_expansion.reason: Fabrics are manufacturing materials, should be showcased there too
content_expansion.benefit: Better content reuse, comprehensive material information
Complete B2B product catalog with detailed specifications

content_expansion.action: Add fiber display component or remove fiber admin
content_expansion.decision: Either implement fiber showcase on Sustainability/Manufacturing or remove feature
content_expansion.benefit: Eliminate orphaned feature, clarify admin capabilities

admin_clarity.action: Add 'Live on Frontend' indicator to admin panels
admin_clarity.implementation: Show badge/icon indicating if admin changes actually affect frontend
admin_clarity.benefit: Admin knows which panels are functional vs decorative

admin_clarity.implementation: Preview button to see how content appears on frontend
admin_clarity.benefit: Admin can verify changes before publishing
